creator: kristinacors
caption: What’s a dream you’re choosing to believe in even though it doesn’t make sense to people around you? #travelcontentcreator #corporateburnout #growthmindset #careerpivot #latina

transcription.text: Look, I don't know who needs to hear this, but your dreams don't have to make sense to everyone to be possible. Do you think after going to college, getting my master's, getting a job on Wall Street that my Dominican dad thought it was a good idea for me to quit my job and become a content creator? He thought I lost my freaking mind, pero esta loca is how we put it, I'm pretty sure. And you know what? I get it. You know, it makes total sense from his perspective why he was worried, of course. But here's what I learned about advice. You want to take advice from people who are living the life that you want to live, who share your values, your goals, and your definition of success, your vision for success. Just because my vision didn't make sense to my dad didn't mean that it wasn't possible. So if someone you love doesn't understand your dream, it doesn't mean it's wrong. It just means it hasn't happened yet. Anyway, I'm curious to hear from you guys. What do you guys think? What's a dream that you're choosing to believe in, even though it doesn't make sense to people around you?
